subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast attained the sacred dust, imagine not that I have forgotten thee. This would be impossible, impossible! Rather, it is for want of time [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای فائز بتربت مقدسه چنان مپندار که فراموشت نمودم محال است محال بلکه عدم مجال
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @stories; anecdotes, @Mosaic imagery, @suffering and imprisonment
